sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, arr Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayRotateLeft(arr, 1) as rotated_array FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET arr = arrayRotateLeft(arr, -2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayRotateLeft(arr, 3) as rotated_array FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
